headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 4, 2026**
article:
The Minnesota Twins secured a thrilling 4-3 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Kazuma Okamoto's 9th home run proving pivotal in the game. Okamoto's fly ball to left center field scored Myles Straw, helping the Twins secure the win. Meanwhile, the Houston Astros took down the Boston Red Sox 3-1, with Bryan Abreu earning the win.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. Yusei Kikuchi has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026. The New York Mets have also placed Ronny Mauricio on the 10-day injured list with a left thumb fracture. Other notable injuries include Germán Márquez's forearm nerve inflammation and Ronald Acuña Jr.'s left hamstring strain.

The Detroit Tigers have bolstered their roster with the addition of infielder Zack Short, acquired from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers have also made a move, trading for 2B Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash. Additionally, the Toronto Blue Jays acquired C Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers in a cash trade.

top_news.title: **Twins Edge Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured a 4-3 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Kazuma Okamoto's 9th home run proving pivotal in the game. Okamoto's fly ball to left center field scored Myles Straw, helping the Twins secure the win.

top_news.title: **Astros Take Down Red Sox 3-1**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a 3-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Bryan Abreu earning the win.

top_news.title: **Reds Fall Short in Pittsburgh**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds dropped a 0-1 decision to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Chase Burns leading the way for the Pirates on the mound. Burns pitched 7.0 innings, striking out 7 and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Orioles 11-3**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a convincing 11-3 victory. Jasson Domínguez led the Orioles' offense with 3 hits, including a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Kikuchi Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels left-hander Yusei Kikuchi has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have bolstered their roster with the addition of infielder Zack Short, acquired from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash.
